violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

The preparation area/3 bay sink does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. pictures will send to inspector as a correct action. see attachment. corrected on 12/18/23 Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

The ceiling in the dishwasher/preparation area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. See Attachment corrected o 12/18/2023. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023
